title: T-047 — Outbox emission wiring across warehouse services (WH §5.1, §7.6, §11.4)
prompt:
# T-047 — Outbox emission wiring across warehouse services (WH §5.1, §7.6, §11.4)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §5.1, §7.6, §11.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Wire the warehouse-event catalog (T-010) into every mutating service (T-016..T-046) so each successful mutation emits exactly one validated event into `outbox_events`. Single emission point per service per ADR-015 service-layer pattern.

## Implementation contract
1. Add `emit(event: WarehouseEvent)` helper in `apps/web/lib/outbox/warehouse-emit.ts` that validates against the T-010 catalog and INSERTs into outbox_events.
2. Modify each of T-017/T-018/T-019/T-021/T-022/T-024/T-025/T-028/T-031/T-032/T-033/T-034/T-036/T-037/T-043/T-044/T-046 to call emit() within the same DB transaction.
3. Ensure each event is emitted exactly once per successful op (no duplicates on retries — idempotency_key in metadata).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/emit-warehouse-event.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-create.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-split.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-merge.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-state-transition.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/grn-from-po.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/grn-from-to.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-create.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-release.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/emit-warehouse-event.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a GRN completes successfully, when outbox is inspected, then exactly one `grn.completed` row exists with the expected lp_ids[].
2. Given an LP split, when outbox is inspected, then exactly one `lp.split` event exists.
3. Given a service mutation rolls back, when outbox is inspected, then no event is present (transactional consistency).
4. Given the catalog validation fails (malformed payload), when emit called, then service rejects and rolls back.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/outbox/__tests__/warehouse-emit.test.ts` covering one event per service + transactional rollback + idempotency.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-emit`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not emit outside the DB transaction (loss-of-event risk).
- Do not emit non-catalog events.
- Do not emit duplicate events on retry.

## Dependencies
- T-010
- T-016
- T-017
- T-018
- T-019
- T-021
- T-022
- T-031
- T-032
